name: persona-os
description: Persona OS by The Product Channel — drop-in operating systems for knowledge workers. Each persona ships a complete kit of Claude skills, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system, and automations. Start with Product Manager OS.

plugins.name: product-manager-os
plugins.description: A complete operating system for product managers: 8 skills (spec writing, metrics review, competitive briefs, roadmapping, sprint planning, stakeholder updates, research synthesis, brainstorming), a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system that learns your product and team, and ready-to-wire automations.
